subject: Analyze and document the storage layer
description:
Read all files in `packages/saga-utils/src/storage/` and produce a detailed document at `docs/storage-layer.md` covering:

1. All storage functions and their signatures
2. How stories, tasks, and epics are read/written
3. The directory structure conventions (.saga/stories/, .saga/epics/, etc.)
4. Path resolution logic (project root detection, worktree paths)
5. Config file handling (.saga/config.json)
6. File format schemas and validation

Include examples of how each function is used in the codebase by searching for call sites.
doneWhen: docs/storage-layer.md exists with comprehensive coverage of all 6 sections.
